items.title: Daily Morning Routine
items.prompt: Describe your morning routine using simple sentences.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', and 'I brush my teeth'.
items.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

ja.prompt: 簡単な文を使って朝のルーティンを説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', 'I brush my teeth' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

zh.prompt: 用簡單句子描述你的早晨例行公事。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I get up at...', 'I have breakfast', 'I brush my teeth' 這樣的片語。
zh.sample: I get up at 7. I have breakfast. I brush my teeth.

items.title: School Activities
items.prompt: Talk about what you do at school in simple sentences.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I go to school', 'I take classes', and 'I play with my friends'.
items.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I play with my friends.

ja.prompt: 学校で何をするかを簡単な文で話してください。
ja.hint: 'I go to school', 'I take classes', 'I play with my friends' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I play with my friends.

zh.prompt: 用簡單句子談談你在學校做什麼。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I go to school', 'I take classes', 'I play with my friends' 這樣的片語。
zh.sample: I go to school. I take classes. I play with my friends.

items.title: After School Routine
items.prompt: Describe your after school routine using simple sentences.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I come home', 'I do my homework', and 'I have dinner'.
items.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

ja.prompt: 放課後のルーティンを簡単な文で説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I come home', 'I do my homework', 'I have dinner' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

zh.prompt: 用簡單句子描述你的放學後例行公事。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I come home', 'I do my homework', 'I have dinner' 這樣的片語。
zh.sample: I come home. I do my homework. I have dinner.

items.title: Evening and Bedtime Routine
items.prompt: Talk about your evening and bedtime routine using simple sentences.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I take a shower', 'I go to bed', and 'Goodnight'.
items.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.

ja.prompt: 夜と就寝のルーティンを簡単な文で話してください。
ja.hint: 'I take a shower', 'I go to bed', 'Goodnight' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.

zh.prompt: 用簡單句子談談你的晚上和睡前例行公事。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I take a shower', 'I go to bed', 'Goodnight' 這樣的片語。
zh.sample: I take a shower. I go to bed. Goodnight.
